text:
Kellie Harrington is a back-to-back Olympic champion after a dominant victory over Wenlu Yang of China - Raf Diallo was in Roland Garros to witness a night of history for irish boxing and Irish sport.

He finds a quiet spot as the home of French tennis is taken over by Irish fans to fill Mikey Stafford in on the night that ireland moved up to 12th on the medal table.

Mikey also chats to David Gillick about a couple of difficult days for Irish athletics, as he also looks ahead to Rhasidat Adeleke's 400m semi-final.

title: Olympics Podcast: Glory, glory Kellie Harrington
description: Kellie Harrington is a back-to-back Olympic champion after a dominant victory over Wenlu Yang of China - Raf Diallo was in Roland Garros to witness a night of history for Irish boxing and Irish sport. We also hear from David Gillick on athletics.
